├── click >=8.1.3

requests 2.32.5 Python HTTP for Humans.
├── certifi >=2017.4.17
├── charset-normalizer >=2,<4
├── idna >=2.5,<4
└── urllib3 >=1.21.1,<3

ruff 0.15.4 An extremely fast Python linter and code formatter, written in Rust.
